---
name: Bug report
about: Report a defect or unexpected behavior
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''

---

## Description

Brief summary of what's broken.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected Behavior

What should happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened (error message, screenshot, etc.).

## System Information

- **Windows version**: (e.g., Windows 11 22H2)
- **.NET version**: (output of `dotnet --version`)
- **RIFT version**: (check ingame `/version`)
- **FollowMe version**: (check CHANGELOG.md or git tag)

## Artifacts

If applicable, attach:
- `capture-dump.bmp` (from `AppData\Local\FollowMe\DesktopDotNet\out\`)
- `capture-dump.json` (decode metadata)
- Error log or console output
- Screenshot of HUD or Inspector

## Additional Context

Any other details (configuration, multibox setup, etc.).
